name: Codex-Gemini-Llmcaller
description: Call API-key authenticated model providers through local profiles, encrypted secrets, Gemini grounding, image inputs, fallback profiles, and automatic continuation.

interface.longDescription: Use a local MCP server to call OpenAI-compatible providers, Anthropic, and the native Gemini REST API with encrypted local secrets, configurable profiles, strict delegation metadata, Gemini Google Search grounding, image inputs, fallback profiles, default Gemini usage, and automatic continuation for truncated responses.
defaultPrompt: Use Gemini to review this answer.
